concerns.text: FR-001 mandates aggregation from 'at least three distinct sources' (arXiv, OpenPolymer, manual literature extraction). T013 only implements fetching from 'arXiv/OpenPolymer sources'. There is no task to implement the 'manual literature extraction' ingestion path, leaving the third required source unimplemented.

FR-009 states the system 'MUST require experimental validation' of the top 3 candidates. T033 only generates a report 'recommending' them for future work. The task list lacks a mechanism to enforce or track the requirement for this validation step, creating a gap between the mandatory requirement and the deliverable.

FR-006 and SC-005 require generating a `clarification_flag.json` when 5-20% of critical variables are missing. T014 only mentions generating `missing_data_report.json` (linked to the >20% halt condition). The task for generating the specific 5-20% flag artifact is missing.

SC-002 requires screening '50+' candidates to ensure statistical power. T028 specifies generating '50+ sustainable candidate SMILES' but does not explicitly include the generation/screening of the petrochemical benchmark set in the count. The task description risks falling short of the total screened population required for the Mann-Whitney U test power analysis.
